title: The Butler
overview: One day during summer vacation, as Yuri's younger brother Oshimoto Yota has nothing to do, the super rich and air-headed heiress Takamiya Nasuno comes to see him!

title: Butler Adventure
overview: Yota, who unwillingly becomes Nasuno's butler, gets a tour of her villa which turns out to be a very strange place...

title: A Boy Called Butler
overview: The childhood friend trio suddenly shows up at Nasuno's villa! Absolute mayhem looms on the horizon!

title: Professor Butler Eats and Speaks
overview: Continuing the previous episode's story, Nasuno and Yota end up playing water polo in the pool with Kanae and her friends. However, the weather suddenly worsens and the group seeks shelter inside the villa where an unfortunate incident occurs...

title: Butler Attack
overview: I nearly passed out from dehydration. Would you like to lick my sweat?

title: The Second Butler Attack
overview: You call this half-assed job cleaning?

title: Takamiyand and the End of the Butler
overview: Because the opening animation just ended. Breaking the fourth wall aside, what is Takamiyand?

title: Pina Colada
overview: This is like the confession scene of a thriller!

title: The Rise and Fall of Dorayaki
overview: In the name of the Takamiya family, let's bake dorayaki!

title: Enough to Fill a 25-Meter Swimming Pool
overview: In the habitats we melt ice from the arctic, ship it, and refreeze it.
